intro.title: Why PeptideLab?
intro.p1: PeptideLab is a European supplier of research peptides focused on quality and transparency. Every batch undergoes independent HPLC analysis and ships with a Certificate of Analysis (COA), so you know exactly what you are receiving.
intro.p2: Our catalog includes over 65 peptides across 10 categories — from BPC-157 and TB-500 for recovery research, through Semaglutide and Tirzepatide for metabolic studies, to Selank and Semax for cognitive research. We also offer ready-made blends and all necessary reconstitution accessories.
intro.p3: We serve researchers, laboratories, and universities across Europe. Delivery from our EU warehouse is 1-3 business days to Bulgaria and 3-7 days to other EU countries. Free shipping on orders over €49.

shop.title: Shop
shop.noProducts: No products found in this category.
shop.intro: Browse our complete catalog of HPLC-verified research peptides. Every product ships with an independent Certificate of Analysis. Filter by category or sort by price to quickly find what you need.

product.researchDisclaimer: This product is sold strictly for in-vitro research purposes. Not approved for human consumption.
product.scienceComingSoon: Scientific data for this peptide is being compiled and will be published soon.
product.coaRequest: The Certificate of Analysis (COA) for this batch is available on request. Contact us via WhatsApp or at info@peptidelab.bg.
product.keyFeature3: Certificate of Analysis included with every order
product.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience with this product.
product.thirdPartyNote: All products are independently tested by accredited laboratories. Results are documented in a Certificate of Analysis (COA).
product.faqPurityAnswer: All peptides undergo HPLC analysis with a guaranteed purity of ≥98%. Every order includes a batch-specific Certificate of Analysis (COA) from an independent laboratory, documenting purity, identity, and molecular weight. Additional analytical data is available on request.
product.faqStorage: How should I store this peptide?
product.faqStorageAnswer: Store lyophilized peptides at -20C in a dark, dry environment. In this form, stability is maintained for up to 24 months. After reconstitution, the solution remains stable for 2-4 weeks at 2-8C. Avoid repeated freeze-thaw cycles — aliquot as needed.
product.faqCoa: Do you provide a Certificate of Analysis?
product.faqCoaAnswer: Yes. Every batch ships with a Certificate of Analysis (COA) from an independent laboratory. The document includes an HPLC chromatogram with purity data and mass spectrometry analysis confirming molecular identity. COA files are available for download on the product page or sent via email with the order.
product.faqShippingAnswer: We ship to Bulgaria (1-2 business days via Econt or Speedy) and all EU member states (3-7 business days via international courier). All shipments are discreetly packaged and temperature-controlled when required.
product.faqReturnsAnswer: Unopened products in original packaging may be returned within 14 days of receipt for a full refund. Due to the nature of research reagents, opened products cannot be accepted. For defective products, we cover return shipping and issue a full refund.

about.title: About PeptideLab
about.mission: PeptideLab supplies research-grade peptides with verified purity to laboratories, universities, and research institutions across Europe. Every product ships with an independent Certificate of Analysis.
about.testedDesc: Every batch undergoes HPLC analysis and mass spectrometry at an independent laboratory. Results are documented in a Certificate of Analysis (COA) available for download on the product page.
about.euDesc: All orders ship from our EU warehouse. Delivery to Bulgaria takes 1-2 business days via Econt or Speedy. Other EU countries receive orders within 3-7 business days by international courier.
about.coaDesc: Every order includes a Certificate of Analysis from an independent laboratory. The document contains an HPLC chromatogram, purity data, and mass spectrometry analysis — full transparency on every product.
about.qualityDesc: Our peptides are synthesized to ≥98% purity (HPLC). We provide batch-specific Certificates of Analysis documenting purity, identity, and molecular weight. All products are lyophilized for long-term stability and delivered in sealed glass vials under inert gas.
about.storyText: PeptideLab was founded on the belief that access to quality research peptides should not be complicated or opaque. For too long, researchers in Eastern Europe were forced to order from distant suppliers with long delivery times and no quality guarantee. We are changing that — with EU-based logistics, HPLC testing of every batch, and full transparency through Certificates of Analysis.
about.qualityStandardsText: Every peptide in our catalog goes through a rigorous quality control process. Raw materials come from certified synthesis laboratories. Every batch is analyzed by HPLC (High Performance Liquid Chromatography) for purity verification — we only accept results ≥98%. We additionally test for endotoxins and microbiological contamination. Results from all analyses are documented in a COA, which is available for download with every product.
about.shippingInfoText: All orders are processed and shipped within 24 hours from our EU warehouse. We use discreet packaging with thermal insulation when necessary to ensure product integrity. We deliver across Europe — 1-3 business days to Bulgaria via Econt or Speedy, 3-7 days to other EU countries.
about.disclaimer: All products are sold strictly for in-vitro research purposes. Not approved for human consumption.

delivery.title: Delivery & Payment
delivery.intro: We process and ship orders every business day. Our priority is that your peptide arrives quickly and in perfect condition.
delivery.processText: After order confirmation, our team prepares the shipment within 24 hours. Peptides are packed in shock-protected packaging. When necessary, we add thermal insulation for sensitive products. You receive an email with a tracking number immediately after shipping.
delivery.trackingText: Every shipment has a tracking number. For Bulgaria — track via the Econt or Speedy website. For international deliveries — via the courier service. You can also track your order directly on our website.
delivery.packagingDesc: All shipments use discreet packaging with no indication of contents. Temperature-sensitive products ship with gel packs in insulated containers to maintain cold chain integrity.
delivery.cardDesc: Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and Google Pay — processed securely via Stripe. Card details are never stored on our servers.
delivery.codDesc: Available for deliveries within Bulgaria only. Pay in cash to the courier when you receive your package.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.intro: We strive for every customer to be fully satisfied. If there is a problem with your order, we are here to help.
returns.damagedText: If you receive a damaged product, please contact us within 48 hours of receipt with a photo of the damage. We will send a replacement free of charge.
returns.wrongItemText: If you received the wrong product, contact us and we will arrange a free return and re-shipment of the correct item.
returns.policyOverview: We accept returns of unopened products in original packaging within 14 days of receipt. Due to the nature of research reagents, products with broken seals cannot be returned.
returns.condition1: Product must be in original, unopened, and undamaged packaging.
returns.condition2: Return request must be submitted within 14 days of receipt.
returns.condition3: Product must have been stored under the conditions specified on the label.
returns.condition4: Return shipping costs are borne by the customer, except for defective or incorrectly shipped products.
returns.howToDesc: Contact us at info@peptidelab.bg or via WhatsApp with your order number and the reason for return. We will send return instructions within 1 business day.
returns.refundDesc: After receiving and inspecting the returned product, we process refunds within 5-10 business days to the original payment method. For cash-on-delivery orders, refunds are issued via bank transfer.
returns.disclaimer: All products are sold strictly for in-vitro research purposes. Not approved for human consumption.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.whatArePeptidesA: Research peptides are synthetic amino acid chains produced for use in laboratory and scientific research. They are used to study biological mechanisms, receptor binding, and cellular processes. They are not pharmaceutical products and are not intended for human consumption.
faq.purityTestingQ: Are your peptides tested for purity?
faq.purityTestingA: Yes, every batch undergoes independent HPLC analysis and mass spectrometry. We guarantee a minimum purity of ≥98%. Analytical results are documented in a Certificate of Analysis (COA), available for download or sent with the order.
faq.coaProvidedQ: Do you provide Certificates of Analysis?
faq.coaProvidedA: Yes. Every order includes a batch-specific Certificate of Analysis (COA). The document contains an HPLC chromatogram with purity data, mass spectrometry analysis confirming molecular identity, and a visual assessment. COA files are available on the product page.
faq.storageA: Store lyophilized peptides at -20C in a dark, dry environment. In this form they remain stable for up to 24 months. After reconstitution, the solution is stable for 2-4 weeks at 2-8C. We recommend aliquoting to avoid repeated freeze-thaw cycles.
faq.paymentMethodsQ: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentMethodsA: We accept debit and credit card payments (Visa, Mastercard), Apple Pay, and Google Pay — processed securely via Stripe. For orders shipping to Bulgaria, we also offer Cash on Delivery — pay in cash to the courier upon receipt.
faq.shippingTimeA: Orders are processed and dispatched within 24 hours. Delivery to Bulgaria takes 1-2 business days via Econt or Speedy. Other EU countries receive orders in 3-7 business days via international courier. Free shipping on orders over €49 (Bulgaria) or €149 (EU).
faq.internationalShippingA: Yes, we ship to all European Union member states. International shipping is €9.99 and free on orders over €149. All shipments are discreetly packaged and include tracking to the delivery address.
faq.returnPolicyA: Unopened products in original packaging may be returned within 14 days of receipt for a full refund. Products must have been stored under the conditions specified on the label. For defective products, we cover return shipping costs.
faq.legalityA: Yes, research peptides are fully legal to purchase and possess for laboratory and scientific purposes. They are classified as research chemicals, not pharmaceutical products. All our products are clearly labeled for in-vitro use only.
faq.orderTrackingQ: How do I track my order?
faq.orderTrackingA: After dispatch, you will receive an email with a tracking number. You can also check the status of your order on our website by entering your order number in the Track Order section. For questions, reach out via WhatsApp for a quick response.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question about a product, order, or delivery? Our team responds within hours on business days. For the fastest response, message us on WhatsApp.
contact.whenToContactText: You can write to us about: questions about a specific peptide or availability, issues with an order or delivery, requesting a Certificate of Analysis (COA), inquiries about larger quantities.
contact.whatsappNote: Message us on WhatsApp for a response within hours
contact.thankYouSub: We will get back to you within 1 business day.

encyclopedia.title: Peptide Encyclopedia
encyclopedia.subtitle: Scientific reference for peptide mechanisms of action, molecular data, and peer-reviewed publications.
encyclopedia.intro: Our peptide encyclopedia is a free scientific reference for researchers. Here you will find detailed information about each peptide — mechanism of action, molecular formula, published studies, and available products. Information is presented in accessible language with links to original scientific publications in PubMed.
encyclopedia.noPeptides: No peptides are currently listed in the encyclopedia.
